name: Parallel Web Search MCP
what_it_does: Web search MCP server from Parallel Web optimized for AI agents — providing high-quality web search results tailored for agent consumption. Enables AI agents to search the web with results formatted and filtered for AI processing rather than human browsing.
use_cases: Web search optimized for AI agent consumption and processing
Research and information gathering from AI assistants via web search
Fact-checking and current information retrieval from knowledge agents
Building search-augmented AI workflows for information retrieval
not_for: Teams with existing Brave, Perplexity, or Tavily search integrations
best_when: An AI agent needs web search capability with results specifically formatted for agent processing — with cleaner extraction and less human-oriented noise than standard search APIs.
avoid_when: You already use Brave Search, Perplexity, or Tavily for web search. Evaluate quality before committing as Parallel Web is a smaller provider.

auth.notes: Parallel Web API key required. Registration at parallel.web needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited searches; paid for higher volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for higher search volumes
pricing.notes: Check current Parallel Web pricing. MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Parallel Web is a smaller provider — evaluate search quality vs Brave/Perplexity before adopting
Search coverage and freshness should be validated for your use case
API key security required — treat as sensitive credential
Compare to established alternatives before committing to this provider
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key required. HTTPS to Parallel Web search service. Search queries sent to third-party provider — consider for sensitive search topics.

security_score_components.security_notes: Search queries sent to Parallel Web. API key security. HTTPS. Evaluate provider trust before sensitive queries.
